title: Create React App is deprecated — now what?
snippet: CRA maintainers officially recommend Vite or Next.js. But migrating enterprise CRA apps is a massive undertaking. Webpack config knowledge is now dead weight.
author: hn_user_rachel

title: The real cost of CRA deprecation for legacy React codebases
snippet: We estimated 6 months of migration effort for our 200k-line CRA app. The pain is not just tooling — it is test suite rewrites, CI pipeline changes, deployment config updates.
author: hn_user_sam
